title: Shri Naina Devi Mata Ki Aarti
intro:
Read Shri Naina Devi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Naina Devi.

────────
description:
Tera adbhut roop nirala,
Aaja! Meri Naina Maai e.
Tujhpai tan man dhan sab waaroon,
Aaja meri Naina Maai e॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Sundar bhavan banaya tera,
Teri shobha nyari.
Neeke neeke khambhe laage,
Ad-bhut chittar kari.
Tera rang biranga dwara॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Jhanjha aur mirdanga baaje,
Aur baaje shehnai.
Turai nagada dholak baaje,
Tabla shabda sunai.
Tere dware naubat baaje॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Peela chola jarad kinari,
Lal dhwaja fahraye.
Sir laalon da mukut viraje,
Nigah nahin thahraye.
Tera roop na varna jaaye॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Paan supari dhwaja,
Nariyal bhent tihari laage.
Balak boodhe nar nari ki,
Bheed khadi tere aage.
Teri jai jaikar manave॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Koi gaaye koi bajaye,
Koi dhyan lagaye.
Koi baitha tere aangan mein,
Naam ki ter sunaye.
Koi nritya kare tere aage॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Koi maange beta beti,
Kisi ko kanchan maya.
Koi maange jeevan saathi,
Koi sundar kaaya.
Bhakton kirpa teri maange॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Naina Devi's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Naina Devi is revered as the 'Goddess of the Eyes' (representing the Shakti Peetha where Sati's eyes fell). Performing her Aarti is believed to cure eye-related ailments, bestow inner wisdom (vision), remove sorrows, and bring prosperity.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: Sunday is considered highly auspicious for worshipping Maa Naina Devi. Additionally, her worship holds immense significance during Navratri and Shravan Ashtami.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Naina Devi during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is very fond of offerings like Halwa, Poori, black chickpeas (Chane), and coconut.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed at home with full devotion by lighting a pure ghee lamp in front of her idol or picture.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Naina Devyai Namah' or 'Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chamundayai Vichche' after the Aarti is highly beneficial for mental peace and focus.
